cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Offline patient education and triage-support assistant for Nigerian and other African communities, explaining symptoms, treatments like oral rehydration therapy, and when to seek urgent care; without replacing professional diagnosis.

test_prompts.prompt: Explain to a patient in simple terms why oral rehydration therapy helps treat cholera and severe diarrhea.
What are the warning signs that someone with diarrhea needs urgent hospital care rather than home treatment?
